name: EU Population Dataflow
description: Ingests EU population statistics from the Eurostat public API and transforms them into a reporting-ready gold table, applying country filtering, type casting, and column renaming at each medallion layer.

queries.name: RawEurostatData
queries.description: Bronze layer — raw population records fetched directly from the Eurostat JSON API. No filtering or type changes applied.
queries.pq:
let
    Source = Json.Document(
        Web.Contents("https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/api/dissemination/statistics/1.0/data/DEMO_GIND?format=JSON&lang=EN")
    ),
    ValueMap   = Source[value],
    Dimensions = Source[dimension],
    TimeLabels = Dimensions[time][category][label],
    GeoLabels  = Dimensions[geo][category][label],
    AsTable    = Record.ToTable(ValueMap),
    RenamedRaw = Table.RenameColumns(AsTable, {{"Name", "RecordKey"}, {"Value", "RawValue"}})
in
    RenamedRaw

queries.name: CleanedPopulation
queries.description: Silver layer — null rows removed, composite key split into Year and GeoCode, population cast to integer.
queries.pq:
let
    Source         = RawEurostatData,
    FilteredNulls  = Table.SelectRows(Source, each [RawValue] <> null and [RawValue] <> ""),
    SplitKey       = Table.SplitColumn(
                         FilteredNulls,
                         "RecordKey",
                         Splitter.SplitTextByDelimiter(":", QuoteStyle.Csv),
                         {"Year", "GeoCode"}
                     ),
    TrimmedText    = Table.TransformColumns(SplitKey, {{"Year", Text.Trim}, {"GeoCode", Text.Trim}}),
    TypedColumns   = Table.TransformColumnTypes(TrimmedText, {{"Year", Int64.Type}, {"RawValue", Int64.Type}}),
    RenamedValue   = Table.RenameColumns(TypedColumns, {{"RawValue", "Population"}})
in
    RenamedValue

queries.name: EUPopulationGold
queries.description: Gold layer — restricted to EU-27 member states, country name resolved from ISO code, sorted for reporting.
queries.pq:
let
    Source        = CleanedPopulation,
    EUCodes       = {"AT","BE","BG","CY","CZ","DE","DK","EE","ES","FI",
                     "FR","GR","HR","HU","IE","IT","LT","LU","LV","MT",
                     "NL","PL","PT","RO","SE","SI","SK"},
    FilteredEU    = Table.SelectRows(Source, each List.Contains(EUCodes, [GeoCode])),
    CountryNames  = Table.AddColumn(
                        FilteredEU,
                        "CountryName",
                        each Record.FieldOrDefault(
                            [AT="Austria",BE="Belgium",BG="Bulgaria",CY="Cyprus",
                             CZ="Czechia",DE="Germany",DK="Denmark",EE="Estonia",
                             ES="Spain",FI="Finland",FR="France",GR="Greece",
                             HR="Croatia",HU="Hungary",IE="Ireland",IT="Italy",
                             LT="Lithuania",LU="Luxembourg",LV="Latvia",MT="Malta",
                             NL="Netherlands",PL="Poland",PT="Portugal",RO="Romania",
                             SE="Sweden",SI="Slovenia",SK="Slovakia"],
                            [GeoCode], [GeoCode]
                        ),
                        type text
                    ),
    SortedRows     = Table.Sort(CountryNames, {{"Year", Order.Descending}, {"Population", Order.Descending}}),
    ReorderedCols  = Table.ReorderColumns(SortedRows, {"Year", "GeoCode", "CountryName", "Population"})
in
    ReorderedCols
